what: W12 hardware run of the staged Vulkan fallback entrypoints (qjl_mul_mv / qjl_get_rows / polar_get_rows) plus a re-confirmation of the publish gate (vulkan-verify) and fused-attn gate (vulkan-verify-fused) on this workstation. Fills the README matrix rows that previously said 'NEEDS HARNESS EXTENSION'. The fixture harness branches (vulkan_verify.cpp run_fused_attn() + the *_get_rows / qjl_mul_mv branches) and the Makefile targets landed earlier on develop; this is the missing on-hardware coverage.

host.cpu: Intel Core Ultra (Arrow Lake-HX) — AVX2 + AVX-VNNI, no AVX-512
gpus: Intel(R) Graphics (ARL) — Mesa ANV (open-source), Vulkan api 1.4.318, subgroup size 32
llvmpipe (LLVM 20.1.2, 256 bits) — Mesa lavapipe software ICD, Vulkan api 1.4.318

spirvVal: Android NDK r28 spirv-val — all 15 standalone .spv files VALID (incl. qjl_get_rows, qjl_mul_mv, polar_get_rows, fused_attn_qjl_tbq, fused_attn_qjl_polar)

qjl_mul_mv.kind: hard gate — reduction-based QJL-score parity (n_heads == n_kv_heads == 1, n_rows == n_tokens == 8)

qjl_get_rows.kind: informational — decode block 0 vs eliza_qjl_dequantize_row; writes one fp32 output per element from all 32 invocations (no reduction); Makefile line is '-'-guarded

intelArlMesaAnv.diagnosis: ANV codegen quirk in the all-threads strided SSBO store — a small varying subset of the 128 outputs intermittently reads back 0.0. NOT a logic bug: the reduction-based qjl.comp / qjl_mul_mv.comp share the exact same decode and are clean and deterministic.

polar_get_rows.kind: informational — decode block 0 vs eliza_polar_dequantize_row; same all-threads strided store; Makefile lines '-'-guarded

intelArlMesaAnv.diagnosis: same ANV strided-store quirk; reduction-based polar.comp / polar_preht.comp share the decode and are clean.

gates.make -C packages/inference/verify refere: PASS — gen_fixture --self-test all finite, fused-attn + tbq V-cache parity OK

notRun.real-gpu-non-Intel-non-software: AMD-native / NVIDIA-native / Android Adreno / Android Mali Vulkan still needed for native graph dispatch — see needs-hardware-ledger.md. MoltenVK and lavapipe do not count.
notRun.kernelContractFlip: fused_attn capability remains needs-runtime-smoke for metal in kernel-contract.json (no Metal fused kernel); not changed by this work. The vulkan fused-attn standalone PASS does not by itself flip a runtime-ready capability bit — that requires built-fork graph dispatch evidence, already recorded separately in linux-vulkan-fork-build-a1-a2-d1-2026-05-11.json's vulkanDispatchSmoke section.
